metadata.title:
INLAND BUYS ESQ MORE


FREIGHT CARS :.

pages.raw_text:
General Manager j. B. Ingersol
of the Inland Empire system has
placed an order for $50 box cars
for use of the local company. The
order was placed in Seattle with
the Seattle Car Co. Inc cars are
to be delivered prior to July 81.
They will be 40 feet in length and
of 10000 pounds capacity.


I'VE will shortly place an addi-
tional order for so fiat cars and IL
more passenger coaches of the
type already in use on the Spokane
& Inland" said Mr.. lngersol.


by spring or early summer we
plan TO be operating botn eastern
and western divisions of the Spo-
kane & Inland into Palouse and
Colfax and this new rolling stock
will all be needed.
